CustomField.description: Lookup to the User who validated the AI-generated triage, classification, or response for this comment. Required before the comment can be set to Resolved when nepa_ai_generated__c = true. Provides administrative record audit trail per OMB M-25-21 AI accountability requirements. Human reviewer confirms the AI output is accurate before it becomes part of the administrative record.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: User who validated the AI-generated content. Required when AI Generated = true.
CustomField.label: Human Validated By
